comments.text: I went straight up to Meteora rented an e-motorcycle for the very first time, just got on it and rode it up the rocks all day what a blast! I got to peddle it, too, and get some exercise! Go to St Stephens Monastery. Cool paintings there and a cool gift shop! Really nice female monastics. One monk-esse treated me to some beeswax candles!
